abilities.name: Surge of Power
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} for each card in opponents' hands.

data.flavor_text:
Sometimes the only way to fight the unimaginable
is with the incredible.

data.name: Sisu

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Bring on the Heat!
abilities.text: When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 1 {Strength} or less.

data.flavor_text: "Come on—what's the worst that can happen?"

keywords.name: Shift 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 2 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Queen of Hearts.)

abilities.name: Let the Game Begin
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters challenges another character, you may draw a card.

data.name: Lumiere

abilities.name: Fervent Address
abilities.text: Your other characters get +1 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
"The invaders are at our gates, mes amis! It's time to
show them what we're made of."

data.name: Card Soldiers
data.flavor_text: You'll have to deal with them sooner or later.

data.name: Queen of Hearts

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.flavor_text:
The glow of lore in the flood caught her eye.
"The spellbook!" she cried. "Don't let it get away!"

data.name: Rapunzel

abilities.name: Tangle
abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent loses 1 lore.

data.flavor_text: "Who are you? And how did you find me?"

data.name: Mulan

abilities.name: Battle Wound
abilities.text: This character enters play with 2 damage.

data.flavor_text: She'll never give up.

keywords.name: Shift 5 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mulan.)

abilities.name: Straight Shooter
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her, she gets +3 {Strength} this turn.

abilities.name: Triple Shot
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character deals damage to another character in a challenge, deal the same amount of damage to up to 2 other chosen characters.

data.name: Raya

abilities.name: Note to Self, Don't Die
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may ready this character. If you do, she can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Two parts bravery, one part cleverness, and a whole
lot of determination.

data.name: Sergeant Tibbs
data.flavor_text: "Yes, sir. Righto, sir. Right away, sir!"

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: On a Roll
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may move him and one of your other characters to the same location for free. If you do, the other character gets +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: I2I

keywords.name: Sing Together 9
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 9 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Each player draws 2 cards and gains 2 lore. If 2 or more characters sang this song, ready them. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.name: You Can Fly!
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.name: A Pirate's Life

keywords.name: Sing Together 6
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 6 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Each opponent loses 2 lore. You gain 2 lore.
data.flavor_text:
Give me a career
As a buccaneer

data.name: Be King Undisputed
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.
data.flavor_text: Respected, saluted

abilities.name: Discipline and Strength
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets +2 {Strength} this turn. Whenever they challenge another character this turn, you may draw a card.

data.name: Dinner Bell

abilities.name: You Know What Happens
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw cards equal to the damage on chosen character of yours, then banish them.

data.flavor_text: The delicate sound of impending doom.

data.name: Agrabah
data.flavor_text:
"Welcome to Agrabah, city of mystery, of enchantment, and the finest merchandise this
side of the river."
—Merchant

data.name: Anna

abilities.name: Let Me Help You
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, your other Hero characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Make sure you know what's truly important and be
willing to fight for it.

data.name: Huey

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Three Nephews
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you have characters named Dewey and Louie in play, you may draw 3 cards.

data.flavor_text: "This looks like part of a larger crystal!"

data.name: Dewey

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "I got it! I knew I could do it! Dewey for the win!"

data.name: Louie

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "Found the last one!"

abilities.name: Washed Away
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put chosen item into its player's inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.name: Making Waves
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {Strength} this turn.

abilities.name: Imperial Invitation
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Princess character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

abilities.name: Out of Season
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a character with cost 2 or less is banished, put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.name: Insulting Remark
abilities.text: During your turn, each opposing character with cost 2 or less gets -1 {Strength}.

data.name: Mufasa
data.flavor_text:
"A king must care for all of the creatures in his
kingdom, no matter their size."

data.name: Cruella De Vil

abilities.name: Now Get Going
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"Isn't it just gorgeous, darling? And just as stylish
as I am."

data.name: Anna

abilities.name: I Was Born Ready
abilities.text: While you have another Hero character in play, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
After talking to Olaf, Anna marched into the
unexpected storm to save Kristoff.

data.name: Flounder
data.flavor_text:
"Excitement...adventure...danger lurking
around every cor— AAAAAGGH!"

data.name: Hans

abilities.name: Royal Schemes
abilities.text: When you play this character, if a Princess or Queen character is in play, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
Hans was confident he could bring Anna to Ursula—
all he needed was something of Kristoff's to lure her in.

data.name: The Queen

abilities.name: Calculating and Vain
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text:
She has only one question, and she'd better like
the answer.

data.name: Grand Pabbie

abilities.name: Ancient Insight
abilities.text: Whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text: When he talks, even the sky listens.

data.name: Hades

abilities.name: Is There a Downside to This?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put chosen opposing character into their player's inkwell facedown.

data.flavor_text:
"He's gotta have a weakness, because everybody's
got a weakness."

data.name: Mama Odie

abilities.name: This Going to Be Good
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: "You dig a little deeper, you'll find everything you need."

data.name: Aurora

abilities.text: Your other characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: As the princess slumbered, her power awoke.

data.name: Aurora

keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
Her music fills the Illuminary's gardens with joy
and light.

data.flavor_text:
She may be young, but she's got the spirit of a
true leader.

data.name: Belle

abilities.name: Tinker
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
A little ingenuity and a lot of heart will take you far
in this world.

data.name: Judy Hopps

abilities.name: Don't Call Me Cute

locked lorebook. You can count on me!"

data.name: Maid Marian

data.flavor_text: She makes every space more beautiful.

data.flavor_text:
When he thought, he thought in the most
thoughtful way he could think.

abilities.text: Your other characters gain Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"They say if you dream a thing more than once,
it's sure to come true!"

abilities.text: When you play this character, if an opponent has more cards in their hand than you, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: Good Shot
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"We never rob. We just sort of borrow a bit from those who
can afford it."

rules: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
data.flavor_text:

—Merlin

data.name: Four Dozen Eggs

data.flavor_text:

rules: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. Put 2 into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Aurelian Gyrosensor

abilities.name: Seeking Knowledge
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters quests, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text:
"It can point you toward lost lore, but if you're not careful,
it'll lead you off a cliff."
—Venturo, an Illumineer

data.flavor_text: It takes a pure heart to calm the raging storm within.

abilities.name: Consider the Coconut
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
The coconut is a versatile gift from the gods, used to make
nearly everything—including baskets to carry more coconuts.

abilities.name: Reincarnation
abilities.text: Whenever a character is banished while here, you may put that card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

window to the outside world.

abilities.text: Your Ally characters get +1 {Strength}.

abilities.name: Stick with Me
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, you may draw cards equal to the {Strength} of chosen Ally character of yours. If you do, choose and discard 2 cards and banish that character.

abilities.name: Take the Leap
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive.

abilities.name: Now's My Chance
abilities.text: {Exert} — This character gains Challenger +3 this turn.

abilities.name: Royal Favor
abilities.text: Your characters named Mickey Mouse gain Support.

abilities.name: Bye Bye, Now
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may banish chosen exerted character with 5 {Strength} or more.

abilities.name: Crowning Achievement
abilities.text: While this character has a card under him, he gets +3 {Strength}, +3 {Willpower}, and +3 {Lore}.
